title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on crime, justice and rehabilitation.

questions.question: To what extent do you think crime is a result of individual choices versus social and economic circumstances?
Do you think the current justice system in most countries is effective at reducing reoffending? What changes might improve it?

script.text: To what extent do you think crime is a result of individual choices versus social and economic circumstances?
Do you think the current justice system in most countries is effective at reducing reoffending? What changes might improve it?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
